# 🔎  Is your WordPress search instant?  (+ a free plugin)

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-06-24 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 871

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Google, ChatGPT, and smart assistants have rewired how people
search online.

Now they expect answers INSTANTLY from their search… without
digging through pages.

Unfortunately, the default search feature in WordPress sites is
slow, requires a page reload, and often shows irrelevant results.

This is why I built the SearchWP Live Ajax Search 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1AKaXhatGSycgE5DpTXbAp3D9I2PmcJLfYBDA2o8bX4 )
plugin.

The best part… It’s FREE!

SearchWP Free Live Search Plugin 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1AKaXhatGSycgE5DpTXbAp3D9I2PmcJLfYBDA2o8bX4 )
It works like a charm… all you have to do is install the free
plugin and forget. No configuration needed :)

If you want, you can get the premium version 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0._iQ_Ca4SkO1_i5zNUSq_esXHacrYV72JFzo81LVbFOo ) and upgrade the
overall search experience.

Remember… search has changed. Give your visitors the experience
they expect.

Cheers,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
